mapper.select: SELECT * FROM callback_events WHERE device_id = #{deviceId} ORDER BY received_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT * FROM callback_events WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY received_at ASC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO callback_events (event_id, device_id, device_seq_id, payload_hash, raw_payload, signature, source_ip, status, received_at) VALUES (#{eventId}, #{deviceId}, #{deviceSeqId}, #{payloadHash}, #{rawPayload}, #{signature}, #{sourceIp}, #{status}, #{receivedAt})
